name: Sulcus
description: Thermodynamic memory for AI agents. Opt-in persistent memory with heat-based decay, semantic search, triggers, and cross-agent sync. Connects to a user-configured Sulcus server (cloud or self-hosted). No data is sent unless the user provides an API key and explicitly enables the plugin.

dataFlows.trigger: User invokes memory_store/memory_search tools, or auto-recall/auto-capture (both opt-in via config)
dataFlows.auth: Bearer API key (user-provided, stored in plugin config)

privacy.storage: Memories stored on configured server, isolated by tenant and namespace. Self-hosted option available via sulcus-local.
privacy.optOut: Set autoRecall: false and autoCapture: false to disable all automatic data transmission.

autoRecall.description: Inject relevant memories before agent starts

maxRecallResults.description: Max memories to inject on auto-recall

captureFromAssistant.description: Also auto-capture from assistant messages (not just user)

captureOnCompaction.description: Preserve important memories before compaction discards history

captureOnReset.description: Capture session summary when /new or /reset is issued

trackSessions.description: Record session start/end events as episodic memories

boostOnRecall.description: Boost memory heat when recalled (spaced repetition)

captureToolResults.description: Capture significant tool results as memories

maxCapturePerTurn.description: Max memories to auto-capture per agent turn
